mapper.sql: share_id, entry_id, share_token, password_hash, expires_at, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from drive_share where entry_id = #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by created_at desc, share_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into drive_share(share_id, entry_id, share_token, password_hash, expires_at, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) values( #{shareId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{shareToken}, #{passwordHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{status}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
